caption: A woman with dark, shoulder-length hair and black-rimmed glasses stands against a solid black background. She is wearing a light green tunic featuring embroidered floral details around the neckline and a simple black necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her clothing. Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking, with her mouth opening and closing and her facial expression shifting slightly as she delivers her presentation. In the bottom-left corner of each scene, a small circular logo is accompanied by the text "NPTEL". The woman remains centered in the frame, maintaining a consistent posture and position while gesturing subtly with her facial expressions as she talks. The lighting remains constant, highlighting her face and clothing against the dark void of the background.
